title: Will any host nation (USA, Mexico or Canada) reach the semifinals of the 2026 World Cup?
question_text: Will any host nation (USA, Mexico or Canada) reach the semifinals of the 2026 World Cup?
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as **Yes** if one or more of the three host nations (the U.S., Canada, or Mexico) reaches the semifinals of the 2026 World Cup.
edge_cases: Resolves VOID if the source market voids or is marked N/A.
